title: convolvulus flexuosus
intro: Convolvulus flexuosus, also known as the Indian morning glory or bindweed, is a species of flowering plant in the morning glory family. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The plant's leaves and flowers have been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving respiratory health. Convolvulus flexuosus can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or powder, and is often used to treat conditions such as bronchitis, fever, and digestive issues.
